debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
𝓒 : Finset (Set α)
d : ℕ
h𝓒 : IsNIPWith d ↑𝓒
⊢ IsNIPWith d ↑(@SetFamily.restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent α 𝓒)

failed_attempts:
classical
  rw [restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent]
  have : ∀ A ∈ 𝓒, (Subtype.val : _ → α) ⁻¹' (A ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) = Subtype.val ⁻¹' A := fun A _ ↦ by
    ext x
    have := x.2
    simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_iInter] at this
    simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_symmDiff, Set.mem_iInter, this.2, not_false_iff,
      iff_true]
  simp_rw [this, Finset.coe_image]
  intro S hS H
  refine h𝓒 (S.map ⟨Subtype.val, Subtype.val_injective⟩) (by simp [hS]) fun T hT ↦ ?_
  obtain ⟨A, hA, hA'⟩ := H (S.filter (·.1 ∈ T)) (filter_subset _ _)
  rcases hA with ⟨A, hA, rfl⟩
  refine ⟨A, hA, ?_⟩
  ext x
  simp only [mem_inter, mem_map, exists_prop, mem_filter, Set.mem_preimage] at hA' ⊢
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨hxA, y, hyS, rfl⟩
    have : y ∈ (Subtype.val ⁻¹' A) ∩ S := mem_inter.2 ⟨hxA, hyS⟩
    rw [hA'] at this
    exact this.2
  · rintro hxT
    obtain ⟨y, hyS, rfl⟩ := mem_map.1 (hT hxT)
    refine ⟨?_, ⟨y, hyS, rfl⟩⟩
    have : y ∈ S.filter (·.1 ∈ T) := mem_filter.2 ⟨hyS, hxT⟩
    rw [← hA'] at this
    exact this.1
